name: commcare
description: Reads CommCare HQ project, application, form, case, user, group, report, location, lookup table, export, and messaging API data; writes supported JSON mutations for cases, users, groups, locations, and lookup tables.

risk.read: external CommCare HQ API reads across configured project resources and account-level user identity/domain endpoints
risk.write: external CommCare HQ mutations for cases, mobile workers, web-user invitations and access, groups, locations, lookup tables, and lookup table rows
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
